'''yowapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:phagocytic|phagocytic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-w-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:phagocytic|phagocytic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yowapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yowapithi|yowapithi]] || [[word:yowapiji|yowapiji]] || [[word:yowapishi|yowapishi]] || [[word:yowapiki|yowapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yowaputhuthu|yowaputhuthu]] || [[word:yowapujuju|yowapujuju]] || [[word:yowapushushu|yowapushushu]] || [[word:yowapukuku|yowapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yowaputhu|yowaputhu]] || [[word:yowapuju|yowapuju]] || [[word:yowapushu|yowapushu]] || [[word:yowapuku|yowapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yowapufthuf|yowapufthuf]] || [[word:yowapufjuf|yowapufjuf]] || [[word:yowapufshuf|yowapufshuf]] || [[word:yowapufkuf|yowapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yowapethe|yowapethe]] || [[word:yowapeje|yowapeje]] || [[word:yowapeshe|yowapeshe]] || [[word:yowapeke|yowapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yowapothotho|yowapothotho]] || [[word:yowapojojo|yowapojojo]] || [[word:yowaposhosho|yowaposhosho]] || [[word:yowapokoko|yowapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yowapotho|yowapotho]] || [[word:yowapojo|yowapojo]] || [[word:yowaposho|yowaposho]] || [[word:yowapoko|yowapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yowapofthof|yowapofthof]] || [[word:yowapofjof|yowapofjof]] || [[word:yowapofshof|yowapofshof]] || [[word:yowapofkof|yowapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yowapÃŸfthÃŸf|yowapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yowapÃŸfjÃŸf|yowapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yowapÃŸfshÃŸf|yowapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yowapÃŸfkÃŸf|yowapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yowapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|yowapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yowapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|yowapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yowapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|yowapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yowapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|yowapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yowapÃŸfthÃŸf|yowapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yowapÃŸfjÃŸf|yowapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yowapÃŸfshÃŸf|yowapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yowapÃŸfkÃŸf|yowapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yowapÃŸfthÃŸf|yowapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yowapÃŸfjÃŸf|yowapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yowapÃŸfshÃŸf|yowapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yowapÃŸfkÃŸf|yowapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yowapÃḊthÃḊ|yowapÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:yowapÃḊjÃḊ|yowapÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:yowapÃḊshÃḊ|yowapÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:yowapÃḊkÃḊ|yowapÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yowapathatha|yowapathatha]] || [[word:yowapajaja|yowapajaja]] || [[word:yowapashasha|yowapashasha]] || [[word:yowapakaka|yowapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yowapatha|yowapatha]] || [[word:yowapaja|yowapaja]] || [[word:yowapasha|yowapasha]] || [[word:yowapaka|yowapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yowapafthaf|yowapafthaf]] || [[word:yowapafjaf|yowapafjaf]] || [[word:yowapafshaf|yowapafshaf]] || [[word:yowapafkaf|yowapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yowapasha|yowapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yowapshÃḋsha|yowapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yowaprosha|yowaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yowapmusha|yowapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yowapyasha|yowapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyowapnkshÃḋsha|goyowapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyowapnkrosha|goyowapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyowapnkmusha|goyowapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyowapnkyasha|goyowapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yowawapasha|yowawapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yowawapshÃḋsha|yowawapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yowawaprosha|yowawaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yowawapmusha|yowawapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yowawapyasha|yowawapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyowawapnkshÃḋsha|goyowawapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyowawapnkrosha|goyowawapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyowawapnkmusha|goyowawapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyowawapnkyasha|goyowawapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yewÃḊpasha|yewÃḊpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yewÃḊpshÃḋsha|yewÃḊpshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yewÃḊprosha|yewÃḊprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yewÃḊpmusha|yewÃḊpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yewÃḊpyasha|yewÃḊpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyewÃḊpnkshÃḋsha|goyewÃḊpnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyewÃḊpnkrosha|goyewÃḊpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyewÃḊpnkmusha|goyewÃḊpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyewÃḊpnkyasha|goyewÃḊpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yowfapasha|yowfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yowfapshÃḋsha|yowfapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yowfaprosha|yowfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yowfapmusha|yowfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yowfapyasha|yowfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyowfapnkshÃḋsha|goyowfapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyowfapnkrosha|goyowfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyowfapnkmusha|goyowfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyowfapnkyasha|goyowfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
